title: CG PAT/PVPT 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: CG PAT/PVPT 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: CG Vyapam PAT/PVPT 2026 applications are open from 2 April to 27 April 2026. The entrance exam for BSc (Hons) Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry and diploma courses will be held on 21 June 2026. Check eligibility, application process, fees, and official links on vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in.

content.text: CG Vyapam PAT/PVPT 2026 is the state-level entrance exam conducted by the Chhattisgarh Professional Examination Board (CG Vyapam) for admission to undergraduate B.Sc agriculture, horticulture, forestry programmes and diploma courses in animal husbandry and fisheries. The online application process started on 2 April 2026 and the last date to apply is 27 April 2026 (5:00 PM).

The entrance exam will be held on 21 June 2026. This single exam opens doors to BSc (Hons) Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, B.Tech (Dairy Technology), Diploma in Animal Husbandry, and Diploma in Fisheries Science in Chhattisgarh institutions. This article provides complete verified details to help students apply successfully.
Direct Link to Check the CG Notification for Vyapam PAT/PVPT 2026: Click Here

sections.heading: Courses Offered Through CG Vyapam PAT/PVPT 2026

rows: Passed Class 12 (10+2) with Physics, Chemistry & Biology (PCB) or Physics, Chemistry & Agriculture/Mathematics
50% aggregate for General category 45% for SC/ST/OBC/PwD categories
Maximum 25–28 years as on 1 July 2026 (exact limit mentioned in notification)
Chhattisgarh domicile candidates get preference and fee benefits
Physics, Chemistry, Biology (or Agriculture/Mathematics group as applicable)
+1 or +2 marks per correct answer Negative marking may apply (check official notification)

sections.heading: How to Apply for CG Vyapam PAT/PVPT 2026 – Step-by-Step Guide

items: Register using a valid mobile number and email ID
Fill the online application form with personal and academic details
Upload scanned photograph, signature, and required documents
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference

content.text: • General Category: ₹200 (approx.) • OBC Category: ₹150 (approx.) • SC/ST/PwD Category: ₹100 (approx.)
Note: Chhattisgarh domicile candidates usually receive fee refund after the exam.
